record.field: contract_date = contract.date_start payslip_date = payslip.date_to payslip_day = payslip_date.day result = 0 if contract_date.year == payslip_date.year and contract_date.month == payslip_date.month: # تم تصحيح الحساب ودمج +1 في نفس السطر calc_day = payslip_day if payslip_day <= 30 else 30 working_days = (calc_day - contract_date.day) + 1 result = round(working_days * (contract.l10n_sa_housing_allowance / 30)) else: result = round(contract.l10n_sa_housing_allowance)

contract_date = contract.date_start payslip_date = payslip.date_to payslip_day = payslip_date.day result = 0 if contract_date.year == payslip_date.year and contract_date.month == payslip_date.month: calc_day = payslip_day if payslip_day <= 30 else 30 working_days = (calc_day - contract_date.day) + 1 result = round(working_days * (contract.l10n_sa_transportation_allowance / 30)) else: result = round(contract.l10n_sa_transportation_allowance)

result = 0 if contract.employee_id.country_id.code == 'SA': insurance_date = contract.employee_id.gosi_registration_date contract_start = contract.date_start start_day = contract_start.day
# 1. تحديد تاريخ نهاية الراتب c_date = payslip.date_to
# 2. تحويل التاريخ الحالي إلى أرقام للمقارنة (سنة، شهر، يوم) # هذه الطريقة تغنينا عن استيراد المكتبات وتعمل دائماً current_tuple = (c_date.year, c_date.month, c_date.day)
# النسبة الافتراضية employee_share_percentage = 9.75
# 3. مقارنة الأرقام مباشرة بالتواريخ المحددة في الجدول if current_tuple >= (2028, 7, 3): employee_share_percentage = 11.75 elif current_tuple >= (2027, 7, 3): employee_share_percentage = 11.25 elif current_tuple >= (2026, 7, 3): employee_share_percentage = 10.75 elif current_tuple >= (2025, 7, 3): employee_share_percentage = 10.25
daily_cost = ((contract.wage or 0) + (contract.l10n_sa_housing_allowance or 0)) * employee_share_percentage / 100 / 30
year_to_calculate = insurance_date.year if insurance_date else False month_to_calculate = insurance_date.month if insurance_date else False
if not insurance_date: result = round(daily_cost * 30) elif insurance_date and year_to_calculate == contract_start.year and month_to_calculate == contract_start.month: result = round(daily_cost * ((30 - start_day) + 1)) elif insurance_date and (year_to_calculate > contract_start.year or (year_to_calculate == contract_start.year and month_to_calculate > contract_start.month)): if month_to_calculate == contract_start.month and year_to_calculate == contract_start.year: days_in_first_month = (30 - start_day) + 1 result = round(daily_cost * days_in_first_month) else: result = round(daily_cost * 30) else: result = 100
result = abs(result)

contract_date = contract.date_start payslip_date = payslip.date_to payslip_day = payslip_date.day result = 0 if contract_date.year == payslip_date.year and contract_date.month == payslip_date.month: calc_day = payslip_day if payslip_day <= 30 else 30 working_days = (calc_day - contract_date.day) + 1 result = round(working_days * (contract.wage / 30)) else: result = round(contract.wage)

contract_date = contract.date_start payslip_date = payslip.date_to payslip_day = payslip_date.day result = 0 if contract_date.year == payslip_date.year and contract_date.month == payslip_date.month: calc_day = payslip_day if payslip_day <= 30 else 30 working_days = (calc_day - contract_date.day) + 1 result = round(working_days * (contract.food_allowance / 30)) else: result = round(contract.food_allowance)

contract_date = contract.date_start payslip_date = payslip.date_to payslip_day = payslip_date.day result = 0 if contract_date.year == payslip_date.year and contract_date.month == payslip_date.month: calc_day = payslip_day if payslip_day <= 30 else 30 working_days = (calc_day - contract_date.day) + 1 result = round(working_days * (contract.phone_allowance / 30)) else: result = round(contract.phone_allowance)
